source_coverage.summary: Reviewed priority email threads with direct Will asks.
Reviewed direct and priority Teams follow-ups.

command_summary: Prioritize the lender memo, the IC follow-up, and the 3 PM partner sync.

top_3_executive_moves.title: Finish lender memo

decisions_needed.title: Decide whether to move the portfolio review

decisions_needed.recommended_action: Confirm whether the review should move before the partner sync.

meeting_prep.title: 3 PM partner sync

carry_forward.title: Data-room owner remains unresolved
carry_forward.summary: The owner needs to be confirmed before the next lender package update.
carry_forward.recommended_action: Confirm owner and deadline with Maya.

task_candidates.title: Ask Maya for lender update owner

task_candidates.recommended_action: Ask Maya for owner and deadline.
